messages.author: WayneWBerry
messages.text: I don't understand why, when I send a RESP_CODE_CONTACTS_START and receive a response of RESP_CODE_CONTACTS_START and start walking the list (CMD_SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE and receiving RESP_CODE_CONTACT until RESP_CODE_END_OF_CONTACTS) that does not return the complete list of Contacts. ~ 31 in my case. It appears that additional contacts are returned on outbound frames and if I listen to those frames I get all ~350 contacts. Does CMD_SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE forces the frames to be returned, if so why does it return "one" as a RESP_CODE_CONTACT)?
messages.content_html: I don't understand why, when I send a RESP_CODE_CONTACTS_START and receive a response of RESP_CODE_CONTACTS_START and start walking the list (CMD_SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE and receiving RESP_CODE_CONTACT until RESP_CODE_END_OF_CONTACTS) that does not return the complete list of Contacts. ~ 31 in my case. It appears that additional contacts are returned on outbound frames and if I listen to those frames I get all ~350 contacts. Does CMD_SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE forces the frames to be returned, if so why does it return "one" as a RESP_CODE_CONTACT)?

messages.author: BerndFfm
messages.text: I send CMD_GET_CONTACTS (Value 4) and then I get the whole list with PACKET_CONTACT (Value 3).
messages.content_html: I send CMD_GET_CONTACTS (Value 4) and then I get the whole list with PACKET_CONTACT (Value 3).
